title: [codex] fix enter usage exports for power users
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Crunching the numbers
gist.blurb: We've tuned up the usage dashboard so our heaviest pollen collectors can export their stats without a hitch. Your daily summaries and detailed logs now load lightning fast and perfectly match your selected time windows.
gist.summary: Optimized the usage dashboard and Tinybird data pipes to prevent timeouts and accurately reflect selected time windows for heavy API users.
gist.impact: Power users can now reliably view and export their detailed usage logs and daily summaries without experiencing silent truncations or timeouts.
gist.visual_concept: Identify the project/tool: Usage dashboard, data exports, Tinybird analytics. Key visual symbols: charts, graphs, data logs, speed. Scene concept: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature (who loves eating data) interacting with a fast, glowing retro dashboard showing usage stats.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a retro computer monitor displaying neat bar charts, while the round Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of data logs and the cute bee mascot watches with a tiny clipboard. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender pastel gradient background. The bee and Nomnom feature chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Text on screen in pixel font: 'STATS'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
